info.title: dark-wallet-rest
info.description:
REST wallet daemon for dark, an Ark protocol server for Bitcoin L2.

Exposes a curated subset of the gRPC surface as HTTP + JSON, with SSE for server-streamed events. Signer-path RPCs (tree nonces, tree signatures, forfeit signing) remain gRPC-only by design.

All endpoints return JSON. Binary fields (PSBTs, pubkeys, signatures) are hex-encoded strings unless noted. Amounts are denominated in satoshis.

get.description: Opens a `text/event-stream` carrying the batch lifecycle: `batch_started`, `batch_finalization`, `batch_finalized`, `batch_failed`, `tree_signing_started`, `tree_tx`, `tree_nonces_aggregated`, `heartbeat`. Each message has the variant name as its `event` and a JSON `BatchEventDto` as its `data`.

post.description: Spends the given VTXOs into an on-chain address via the next commitment transaction. Returns a placeholder `exit_id` that becomes the final commitment txid once the round settles.

get.description: Returns server identity, network, session parameters, and VTXO limits. Equivalent to `ark.v1.ArkService.GetInfo` over gRPC.

post.description: Registers a BIP-322-signed intent for the next round. The body carries the proof PSBT (hex) and a canonical JSON `message`; optionally a `delegate_pubkey` (hex compressed) for delegated submission.

post.summary: Confirm participation in the current batch
post.description: Called after a `BatchStarted` event to acknowledge the VTXO tree.

post.summary: Estimate the fee for a proposed intent
post.description: Takes the input VTXO ids and output destinations and returns the server's fee estimate. The path `{id}` is unused today but kept for symmetry with per-intent endpoints.
Returns the session's boarding address + remaining drip budget. The daemon does not broadcast on-chain — operators must run an external funding service.
Generates a fresh secp256k1 keypair, derives a boarding address via `ArkService.GetInfo`, and returns both to the caller. The secret key is returned **only once**.

get.summary: Look up a session (no secret key)

parameters.name: batch_outpoint
parameters.description:
`txid:vout` batch outpoint. If absent, the round's commitment tx is used
as the batch outpoint (`{commitment_txid}:0`).

get.description: Opens a `text/event-stream` carrying `commitment_tx`, `ark_tx`, and `heartbeat` events as they appear on-chain or in-server.

post.summary: Submit a signed Ark virtual tx
List pending Ark txs matching an intent filter

get.summary: Look up a pending Ark tx by id (best-effort)
get.description: Calls `ArkService.GetPendingTx` with an empty Intent filter and returns the first pending tx whose `ark_txid` matches. For authenticated queries use `POST /v1/txs/query`.

get.summary: List VTXOs owned by a pubkey

parameters.name: pubkey
parameters.description: Hex-encoded x-only pubkey (or compressed 33-byte pubkey) of the owner.

get.summary: Chain of virtual txs leading to a VTXO
get.description: `outpoint` is `txid:vout`. Returns the chain of VTXOs that were spent to arrive at this one.

privkey_hex.description: Hex-encoded secret key. **Only returned once**, at session creation.

children.description:
Map of child-index → child txid. Keys are stringified u32 so the value
is JSON-compatible (all JSON object keys must be strings).

OutputDto.description:
One output destination: exactly one of `vtxo_script` or `onchain_address`
must be set.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.

status.description: HTTP status code for this occurrence of the problem.

title.description: Short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

delegate_pubkey.description: Optional delegate pubkey (hex-encoded compressed). Empty string if absent.

message.description: Canonical intent message (JSON text per the BIP-322 proof).

signed_ark_tx.description: Signed Ark virtual tx, hex encoded.
